evidence.snippet: Delivering reliable energy in the harshest operational environments, whether it’s next-gen batteries, high-efficiency electric propulsion, or power management systems.
CRG Defense responds to Federal UAS component sourcing restrictions with American-made battery and propulsion solutions

items.notes: Battery cells, battery packs, and energy systems explicitly marketed to drone OEMs as NDAA Section 842-compliant domestic alternatives

evidence.snippet: *   Aerospace – UAV propulsion, eVTOL actuation, airborne auxiliary systems

items.notes: Electric motors for UAV propulsion; platforms spanning 1.5 kW to 50 kW demonstrated

evidence.snippet: *   Power Electronics & Controls – High-voltage (400–800 VDC) controller development, advanced switching topologies, EMI/EMC mitigation, firmware optimization, and control algorithm tuning

items.notes: Motor controllers (25 kW commercially available); high-voltage (400–800 VDC) controller development

evidence.snippet: [CRG Defense AeroVox drone communication system demonstrated at U.S. border](https://crgdefense.com/2025/12/02/crg-defense-aerovox-drone-communication-system-demonstrated-at-u-s-border/)

items.notes: AeroVox is a two-way drone communications payload demonstrated at U.S. border and UTAC 2025

evidence.snippet: CRG Defense has applied its additive manufacturing capabilities across a wide range of programs and products, including its **[Heavy Lift Drone](https://crgdefense.com/systems-division/)**, **[CRG G-Series soldier-worn battery](https://crgdefense.com/battery-cells-packs/#G-series)**, and various other UAS platforms.

CRG achieved a significant milestone in developing its High-Fidelity Drone Audio System, known as Bellbird. The system was successfully tested by the Department of Homeland Security Science and Technology Directorate during an operational field assessment organized by the National Urban Security Technology division of at Mississippi State University’s Raspet Flight Research Laboratory.

The Detection Rover is a rugged, semi-autonomous ground vehicle built for situational awareness. Featuring onboard AI and 360° video sensors, it autonomously navigates challenging terrain while collecting real-time environmental data to support ISTAR missions and perimeter security.

items.notes: Heavy Lift Drone (UAS platform), Bellbird (complete VTOL UAS for aerial comms), Detection Rover (semi-autonomous UGV for ISTAR)

evidence.snippet: _CRG Defense’s new ARGO 500 HYPERSPEED system provides precision, filament-based additive manufacturing for certifiable aerospace parts and advanced industrial components. It processes high-temperature super polymers such as PEEK, Carbon PEEK and PEKK, enabling metal-like performance in a 500-millimeter build space._

items.notes: Additive manufacturing with ARGO 500 and ARGO 1000 systems producing certifiable aerospace parts from high-temp polymers (PEEK, PEKK)

evidence.snippet: CRG Defense responds to Federal UAS component sourcing restrictions with American-made battery and propulsion solutions

ndaa.notes: Site claims compliance with NDAA Section 842 (FY2026, battery sourcing from foreign entities of concern) and FCC Covered List requirements — adjacent to but not the same as NDAA Sec 848/889. No explicit 848/889 claim found.

evidence.snippet: Founded in 1997, CRG Defense is a secure, scalable defense company, purpose-built for rapid deployment of defense and dual-use technologies into field-ready systems. From prototype to production — CRG Defense delivers mission-critical innovation across systems, materials, power, and infrastructure.
*   AS9100D-Compliant, Full-Lifecycle Delivery – From initial concept through operational deployment
*   Ready Now – Fielded systems, platform-proven experience, and commercially available controller hardware

readiness.notes: AS9100D-compliant processes, commercially available controller hardware, and active production of batteries and propulsion systems. Some products (AeroVox, Bellbird) are still being refined based on field testing feedback.

tagline: Miamisburg-based subsystem supplier across power systems, propulsion, communications, airframes, and structures for unmanned and manned platforms. Produces battery cells and packs (G-Series), electric machines and control systems, AeroVox drone, and sensor packages (MoTES, Bellbird audio). NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of production readiness and B-1 modernization work, but supply-chain visibility gaps remain.
